text: US economy expanded at sluggish 0.7% in fourth quarter, government says, downgrading first estimate - AP News

text: Egg prices have taken a beating. What's behind the drop? - NPR
fullText: A year ago, eggs were scarce and prices were sky-high. But avian flu took a much smaller toll on America's egg-laying chickens this winter than last, and egg prices have tumbled 42%.
